title: DC Comics Superman 2pc Cinch Bag Drawstring Backpacks Bundle Boys Age 3 and Up
description:
Is your child a Toy Story fan? Then this drawstring cinch backpack and matching set of stickers bundle is a must-have gift this year! The backpack and stickers both feature characters from the hit movie franchise: Buzz Lightyear, Woody, and more! Kids will love showing off their favorite Toy Story characters at school! The drawstring tote bag measures 18” by 13” and can easily hold your child’s school supplies and sporting gear like binders, school books, notebooks, accessories, and a water bottle. The bag features an easy-to-use cinch closure to ensure supplies stay secured in the bag when not in use. The adjustable cinch strap design provides customizable comfort that will fit most kids

DC Comics Superman 2pc Cinch Bag Drawstring Backpacks Bundle Boys Age 3 and Up

Double the Heroic Fun with the 2pc Superman Cinch Bag Bundle!

Get ready to save the day - and your school supplies - with this 2pc Superman Cinch Bag Bundle! Perfect for little heroes on the go, this set features two drawstring backpacks inspired by the legendary Superman, complete with his iconic red cape design. Your child will love showing off their favorite superhero in style!

Key Features

  • SUPERMAN-INSPIRED DESIGN - Each bag in the 2pc bundle features Superman’s iconic red cape, perfect for fans of the legendary DC Comics superhero.
  • SPACIOUS AND VERSATILE - Measuring 18” x 13”, these cinch bags easily hold school supplies, sports gear, books, and more, making them ideal for everyday adventures.
  • DURABLE AND WATER-RESISTANT - Made from sturdy polyester, these bags protect belongings from rain or spills, ensuring your child’s essentials stay safe and dry.
  • ADJUSTABLE AND COMFORTABLE - Designed with adjustable cinch straps, the bags provide a customizable and comfortable fit for most kids.
  • PERFECT GIFT FOR SUPERMAN FANS - Whether for back-to-school, birthdays, or superhero-themed occasions, this 2pc cinch bag set is a must-have for little heroes on the go!

Product Specifications

  • MPN: SUP2PCCB24WAL
  • UPC: 885189340402
  • Color: Multicolor
  • Size: Medium

Each bag measures a spacious 18” x 13”, making it ideal for carrying school supplies, sports gear, or everyday essentials like books, notebooks, and water bottles. The durable water-resistant polyester ensures their belongings stay protected, rain or shine, while the easy-to-use cinch closure keeps everything secure.

Designed for comfort and convenience, the adjustable cinch straps provide a customizable fit for most kids, making these bags perfect for school, practice, or any superhero adventure. With two bags included, your child can alternate styles or share the fun with a fellow fan!

Whether it’s for back-to-school, a birthday, or just because, this 2pc Superman Cinch Bag Bundle is the ultimate gift for fans of the DC Comics hero.
